Retro Thrusters.name: Retro Thrusters
Retro Thrusters.description:
Also at 2nd tier, when an attacker that a crew member can see deals damage to your ship with a weapon, they can use their reaction to immediately move the ship up to 50 feet in a direction of their choice, halving the damage your ship takes. The orientation of the ship does not change.

Once this feature has been used, it can't be used again until the ship recharges.

Role: Carrier.name: Role: Carrier
Role: Carrier.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Command Ship

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Charisma and Intelligence attributes.

Paragon Cruiser.name: Paragon Cruiser
Paragon Cruiser.description: As of 5th tier, your starship is the best in its class. One of your ship's ability scores increases by 4, and its maximum for this score increase by 4. Another two ability scores increase by 2, and its maximum for these scores increase by 2.

Elusive Target.name: Elusive Target
Elusive Target.description: Also at 4th tier, the size and agility of your ship makes it easy to avoid attacks. No primary weapon attacks made against your ship can benefit from advantage while your ship is not disabled.

Capital Railgun.name: Capital Railgun
Capital Railgun.description:
Also at 3rd tier, your ship is equipped with a forward-mounted special version of a Heavy Slug Railgun at its helm. Your ship is considered to meet this weapon's constitution requirement regardless of your ship's constitution ability score. The damage dealt by this Heavy Slug Railgun is [[/r 7d12]].

This weapon does not utilize or count as a weapon hardpoint.

Role: Navigator.name: Role: Navigator
Role: Navigator.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Navigator

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Intelligence attribute.

Role: Predator.name: Role: Predator
Role: Predator.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Predator

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Dexterity attribute.

Paragon Snubfighter: Scrambler.name: Paragon Snubfighter: Scrambler
Paragon Snubfighter: Scrambler.description:
As of 5th tier, your starship is the best in its class.

Scrambler

Your ship's Charisma score increases by 2. Its maximum for this score increases by 2.

Keen Accuracy.name: Keen Accuracy
Keen Accuracy.description: At 5th tier, the critical hit range of your ship's weapons increases by 1.

Role: Superiority Fighter.name: Role: Superiority Fighter
Role: Superiority Fighter.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Superiority Fighter

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Dexterity attribute.

Role: Flagship.name: Role: Flagship
Role: Flagship.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Flagship

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Charisma and Wisdom attributes.

Role: Probe.name: Role: Probe
Role: Probe.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Probe

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Wisdom attribute.

Paragon Swarmer: Munition.name: Paragon Swarmer: Munition
Paragon Swarmer: Munition.description:
As of 5th tier, your starship is the best in its class.

Munition

Your ship's Constitution score increases by 2. Its maximum for this score increases by 2.

Paragon Swarmer: Droid.name: Paragon Swarmer: Droid
Paragon Swarmer: Droid.description:
As of 5th tier, your starship is the best in its class.

Droid

Your ship's Intelligence score increases by 2. Its maximum for this score increases by 2.

Role: Colonizer.name: Role: Colonizer
Role: Colonizer.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Command Ship

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Constitution and Intelligence attributes.

Role: Missile Boat.name: Role: Missile Boat
Role: Missile Boat.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Missile Boat

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Wisdom attribute.

Paragon Snubfighter: Scout.name: Paragon Snubfighter: Scout
Paragon Snubfighter: Scout.description:
As of 5th tier, your starship is the best in its class.

Scout

Your ship's Intelligence score increases by 2. Its maximum for this score increases by 2.

Role: Freighter.name: Role: Freighter
Role: Freighter.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Freighter

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Constitution attribute.

Role: Mobile Metropolis.name: Role: Mobile Metropolis
Role: Mobile Metropolis.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Flagship

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Constitution and Wisdom attributes.

Concentrated Fire.name: Concentrated Fire
Concentrated Fire.description: Also at 2nd tier, once per turn, when you attack a ship of size Large or larger, and it was previously hit by an allied ship of size Large or larger's weapons since the end of its last turn, you have advantage on the attack. If you already had advantage, you may instead reroll one of the dice once (your choice).

Hold Together.name: Hold Together
Hold Together.description: Also at 3rd tier, when your ship takes damage while at 0 hull points, it makes a Destruction saving throw, instead of automatically failing.

Blockade Runner.name: Blockade Runner
Blockade Runner.description:
Also at 1st tier, your starship gains the ability to react to damage from large ships.

As a reaction to being hit with an attack roll from a Large or larger ship, a crewmember at the helm can use their reaction to immediately move the ship forward an amount equal to half its flying speed (rounded down) and then roll a Blockade Runner die, which is a [[/r 1d4]], and subtract it from the triggering attack roll, potentially causing it to miss.

Your ship's Blockade Runner die changes when it reaches certain tiers. The die becomes a [[/r 1d6]] at 2nd tier, a [[/r 1d8]] at 3rd tier, a [[/r 1d10]] at 4th tier, and a [[/r 1d12]] at 5th tier.

This feature can be used a number of times equal to 3 x your ship's tier. All expended uses are regained when the ship is refitted.

Role: Scrambler.name: Role: Scrambler
Role: Scrambler.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Scrambler

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Charisma attribute.

Role: Droid.name: Role: Droid
Role: Droid.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Droid

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Intelligence attribute.

Nimble Aerobatics.name: Nimble Aerobatics
Nimble Aerobatics.description: Also at 2nd tier, your ship is so nimble that it can ignore unenhanced difficult terrain, and when it you would use an action to break free of an effect that is tractoring or otherwise restraining your ship, you can instead use a bonus action.

Nimble Starship.name: Nimble Starship
Nimble Starship.description: Also at 2nd tier, your ship can add half its Dexterity modifier (minimum of one) to any saving throw it makes that doesn't already include that modifier.

Adaptive Armor.name: Adaptive Armor
Adaptive Armor.description:
Also at 4th tier, when your ship is hit with an attack roll, a crew member at the helm can add the ship's Constitution modifier to AC, potentially causing the attack to miss.

This feature can be used a number of times equal to your ship's tier. All expended uses are regained when the ship is refitted.

Paragon Swarmer: Predator.name: Paragon Swarmer: Predator
Paragon Swarmer: Predator.description:
As of 5th tier, your starship is the best in its class.

Predator

Your ship's Dexterity score increases by 2. Its maximum for this score increases by 2.

Role: Industrial Center.name: Role: Industrial Center
Role: Industrial Center.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Flagship

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Constitution and Strength attributes.

Paragon Transport.name: Paragon Transport
Paragon Transport.description: As of 5th tier, your starship is the best in its class. Two of your ship's ability scores increase by 2. It's maximums for these scores increase by two.

Devastator.name: Devastator
Devastator.description:
Also at 5th tier, as an action, a single crew member can give the ship the following benefits for 1 minute:

  • Your ship has resistance to all damage.
  • Your ship's ship attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20 on the d20.

This effect ends early if the ship is disabled. Once this feature has been used, it can't be used again until the ship undergoes refitting.

Paragon Snubfighter: Attack Fighter.name: Paragon Snubfighter: Attack Fighter
Paragon Snubfighter: Attack Fighter.description:
As of 5th tier, your starship is the best in its class.

Strike Fighter

Your ship's Strength score increases by 2. Its maximum for this score increases by 2.

Role: Ambassador.name: Role: Ambassador
Role: Ambassador.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Ambassador

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Charisma and Constitution attributes.

Broadside.name: Broadside
Broadside.description: Also at 4th tier, once on each of their turns, when a crew member makes a ship attack, they can make another attack with the same weapon against a different ship that is within 100 feet of the original target and within range of their weapon.

Paragon Swarmer: Probe.name: Paragon Swarmer: Probe
Paragon Swarmer: Probe.description:
As of 5th tier, your starship is the best in its class.

Probe

Your ship's Wisdom score increases by 2. Its maximum for this score increases by 2.

Damage Control.name: Damage Control
Damage Control.description:
Also at 1st tier, your starship gains the ability to automatically mitigate damage from ships.

Once per turn, as a reaction to being dealt damage by a ship weapon, a crew member can use their reaction and roll a Damage Control die, which is a [[/r 1d4]], and subtract it from the damage roll.

Your ship's Damage Control die changes when it reaches certain tiers. The die becomes a [[/r 1d6]] at 2nd tier, a [[/r 1d8]] at 3rd tier, a [[/r 1d10]] at 4th tier, and a [[/r 1d12]] at 5th tier.

This feature can be used a number of times equal to 4 x your ship's tier. All expended uses are regained when the ship undergoes refitting.

Role: Satellite.name: Role: Satellite
Role: Satellite.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Satellite

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Charisma attribute.

Role: Bomber.name: Role: Bomber
Role: Bomber.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Bomber

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Wisdom attribute.

Role: Command Ship.name: Role: Command Ship
Role: Command Ship.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Command Ship

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Charisma and Wisdom attributes.

Role: Juggernaut.name: Role: Juggernaut
Role: Juggernaut.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Command Ship

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Constitution and Strength attributes.

Paragon Dreadnought.name: Paragon Dreadnought
Paragon Dreadnought.description: As of 5th tier, your starship is the best in its class. Two of your ship's ability scores increase by 4, and its maximum for these scores increase by 4. Another ability score increases by 2, and its maximum for this score increases by 2.

Role: Picket Ship.name: Role: Picket Ship
Role: Picket Ship.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Picket Ship

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Dexterity and Wisdom attributes.

Paragon Snubfighter: Shuttle.name: Paragon Snubfighter: Shuttle
Paragon Snubfighter: Shuttle.description:
As of 5th tier, your starship is the best in its class.

Shuttle

Your ship's Constitution score increases by 2. Its maximum for this score increases by 2.

Role: Blockade Ship.name: Role: Blockade Ship
Role: Blockade Ship.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Flagship

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Dexterity and Strength attributes.

Paragon Frigate.name: Paragon Frigate
Paragon Frigate.description: As of 5th tier, your starship is a the best in its class. Three of your ship's ability scores increase by 2. Its maximum for these scores increases by 2.

Role: Interdictor.name: Role: Interdictor
Role: Interdictor.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Command Ship

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Dexterity and Strength attributes.

A Leaf on the Wind.name: A Leaf on the Wind
A Leaf on the Wind.description:
Also at 5th tier, when your ship, or a deployed crew member, makes an ability check, attack roll, or saving throw, a deployed crew member can use their reaction to treat the amount rolled on the d20 as a 20.

Once this feature has been used, it can't be used again until the ship recharges.

Auto-Thrusters.name: Auto-Thrusters
Auto-Thrusters.description: Also at 3rd tier, your ship can add half of its Strength modifier (rounded down, minimum of one) to its Dexterity Saving Throws.

Armor Class Improvement.name: Armor Class Improvement
Armor Class Improvement.description:
Beginning at second Tier, your ship's armor class improves, giving your ship a +1 to its AC. It gains an additional +1 bonus to AC at 3rd Tier (+2 total), 4th Tier (+3 total), and 5th Tier (+4 total).

Applies to all ship sizes.

Role: Worker.name: Role: Worker
Role: Worker.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Worker

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Strength attribute.

Role: Attack Fighter.name: Role: Attack Fighter
Role: Attack Fighter.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Attack Fighter

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Strength attribute.

Role: Warship.name: Role: Warship
Role: Warship.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Flagship

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Wisdom and Strength attributes.

Prime Doctrine.name: Prime Doctrine
Prime Doctrine.description:
Also at 2nd tier, your starship strikes fear in your enemies. When crew members roll initiative, one crew member can attempt to frighten other ships. Each crew member deployed on a hostile ship must make a Wisdom saving throw contested by a Charisma (Menace) check. On a failed save, affected crew members have disadvantage on the first ability check, attack roll, or saving throw they make each round for 1 minute. At the end of each of their turns, they repeat this save, ending this effect on a success. Additionally, on a successful save, they become immune to this feature for one day.

Once this feature has been used, it can't be used again until the ship recharges.

Role: Cruiser.name: Role: Cruiser
Role: Cruiser.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Cruiser

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Wisdom and Strength attributes.

Role: Ship\u0027s Tender.name: Role: Ship's Tender
Role: Ship\u0027s Tender.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Ship's Tender

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Constitution and Strength attributes.

Role: Explorer.name: Role: Explorer
Role: Explorer.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Explorer

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Dexterity and Intelligence attributes.

Role: Courier.name: Role: Courier
Role: Courier.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Courier

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Dexterity attribute.

Paragon Swarmer: Worker.name: Paragon Swarmer: Worker
Paragon Swarmer: Worker.description:
As of 5th tier, your starship is the best in its class.

Worker

Your ship's Strength score increases by 2. Its maximum for this score increases by 2.

Role: Researcher.name: Role: Researcher
Role: Researcher.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Flagship

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Intelligence and Wisdom attributes.

Capital Ship.name: Capital Ship
Capital Ship.description:
Also at 5th tier, a crew member can, as a bonus action, delegate a plan of action to the crew. The ship can immediately move up to its flying speed, and up to five crew members on that ship can use their reaction to immediately take an action.

Once this feature has been used, it can't be used again until the ship recharges.

Pinpoint Strike.name: Pinpoint Strike
Pinpoint Strike.description:
Also at 1st tier, your starship gains the ability to slip underneath the shields of an enemy ship.

When your ship occupies the same square occupied by a target ship and the crew member at the helm makes an attack roll, as a reaction, they can, before rolling the attack, roll a Pinpoint Strike die, which is a [[/r 1d4]], and add it to the attack roll. If the attack requires a saving throw instead, you may subtract the Pinpoint Strike die from the target's save result. On a hit or a failed save, the attack deals normal damage that bypasses any shields and directly hits the hull of the target ship. This feature can only be used once per round.

Your ship's Pinpoint Strike die changes when it reaches certain tiers. The die becomes a [[/r 1d6]] at 2nd tier, a [[/r 1d8]] at 3rd tier, a [[/r 1d10]] at 4th tier, and a [[/r 1d12]] at 5th tier.

This feature can be used a number of times equal to your ship's tier. All expended uses are regained when the ship recharges.

Evasive Maneuvers.name: Evasive Maneuvers
Evasive Maneuvers.description:
Also at 1st tier, when a crew member at the helm rolls for initiative, they can immediately move the ship. This movement happens before the initiative order is determined.

The amount the ship moves is determined by rolling an Evasive Maneuvers die, which is a [[/r 1d4]], and multiplying it by 50 feet. The ship then gains that many feet that it can move or spend to turn.

Your ship's Evasive Maneuvers die changes when it reaches certain tiers. The die becomes a [[/r 1d6]] at 2nd tier, a [[/r 1d8]] at 3rd tier, a [[/r 1d10]] at 4th tier, and a [[/r 1d12]] at 5th tier.

This feature can be used a number of times equal to 2 x your ship's tier. All expended uses are regained when the ship is refitted.

Role: Battleship.name: Role: Battleship
Role: Battleship.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Command Ship

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Wisdom and Strength attributes.

Paragon Snubfighter: Bomber.name: Paragon Snubfighter: Bomber
Paragon Snubfighter: Bomber.description:
As of 5th tier, your starship is the best in its class.

Bomber

Your ship's Wisdom score increases by 2. Its maximum for this score increases by 2.

Ability Score Improvement.name: Ability Score Improvement
Ability Score Improvement.description:
Ability Score Improvement

At 1st tier, and again at 2nd, 3rd, 4th, and 5th tier, you can increase one of your ship's ability scores by 2, or you can increase two of these ability scores by 1. You can't increase your ability scores other than Dexterity above 20, or your Dexterity above 22, with this feature.

Paragon Swarmer: Satellite.name: Paragon Swarmer: Satellite
Paragon Swarmer: Satellite.description:
As of 5th tier, your starship is the best in its class.

Satellite

Your ship's Charisma score increases by 2. Its maximum for this score increases by 2.

Role: Munition.name: Role: Munition
Role: Munition.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Munition

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Constitution attribute.

Role: Gunship.name: Role: Gunship
Role: Gunship.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Gunship

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Strength attribute.

Role: Corvette.name: Role: Corvette
Role: Corvette.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Corvette

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Strength and Dexterity attributes.

Role: Yacht.name: Role: Yacht
Role: Yacht.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Yacht

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Charisma attribute.

Role: Shuttle.name: Role: Shuttle
Role: Shuttle.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Shuttle

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Constitution attribute.

Role: Scout.name: Role: Scout
Role: Scout.description:
At tier 0, you adopt a particular style of design for your ship.

Scout

Your ship gains a +1 bonus to the Intelligence attribute.

Citadel.name: Citadel
Citadel.description: Also at 4th tier, the capacity for all of your suites is doubled. If a suite type's capacity was already doubled, its size is instead tripled from its standard size. Additionally, your starship's maximum capacity for fuel and consumables doubles, and civilians, crew members, and troopers aboard your starship have advantage on Constitution saving throws made to avoid Exhaustion. If the capacity for fuel and/or consumables was already double its standard amount, it is now triple its original capacity.
